disagreements.chief_strategist_resolution: Use most conservative CIO manual review posture when agents disagree.
Preserve deterministic operator blocks and escalate risk items to CIO review.

agents.agent_role: Interpret concentration, cash, cluster exposure, HHI, largest position, and top exposures.
agents.summary: This desk's lens: structural safety of portfolio composition against concentration and cluster risks.
key_findings: [DATASET] Cash weight at 95.68% meets min_cash_weight mandate (0.05) but leaves minimal buffer for add-risk
[OPERATOR] VIXY and VXX are tactical with CIO_ONLY execution authority; QBTS and LUNR are satellite with CIO_ONLY
[THESIS] QBTS shows 41.75% unrealized PNL with high daily change (12.37%) indicating potential volatility risk
risk_flags: P1: QBTS position has 41.75% unrealized PNL and 12.37% daily change (high volatility)
P2: Concentration HHI at 0.0006 is extremely low (healthy) but largest position (VIXY) at 1.88% is tactical
P3: Cash weight at 95.68% is high but may not support add-risk without liquidity buffer
blocked_actions_observed: QBTS and LUNR positions require CIO_ONLY execution due to satellite mandates
VIXY and VXX are tactical with research-only status
allowed_actions_observed: Add-risk operations require cash buffer above 5% (current 95.68%)
QBTS position can be adjusted but must maintain CIO_ONLY execution
affected_theses: QBTS volatility risk (12.37% daily change) may trigger re-evaluation of satellite mandate
affected_assets: QBTS (Technology sector) has high daily change (12.37%) and 41.75% unrealized PNL
blind_spots: No historical volatility data for QBTS/LUNR positions
Lack of liquidity metrics for QBTS/LUNR positions

P1: FOMC June 16-17 risk (interest rate volatility)
